reviews.review_description: So cute and fun so relaxing
Can't grab the star to start the game for the fist time

I was playing for about 10 minutes and one of my fish flew off into the sky and never returned another disappear and after about five fish no more spawned. Also even without the bugs there’s really not much to do except pet and feed fish and get gifts that are just plants and stuff for the scenery (which is just your room but aqua)

I didn't know it was possible to be this delighted with a game (although, admittedly I do love fish). It has completely won my heart. This game really made me smile, and after many years of VR gaming, that is really unusual. I am a 50 year old man and normally I only use VR to play violent games involving guns, but these fish have brought joy to my life. One can only imagine how much greater this game will be when it's fully fleshed-out.  I hope it does well. Please take my money.
Great little experience! There is a ton of fish to collect, and each one is so cute and unique. Reminds me of Neko Atsume, but with colorful fish 🐠
